        NAME imguizmo
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/CedricGuillemet/ImGuizmo.git
        GIT_TAG 1.83
)

        NAME fastgltf
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/spnda/fastgltf.git
        GIT_TAG v0.9.0
        GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
)

        NAME tinyusdz
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/lighttransport/tinyusdz.git
        GIT_TAG v0.8.0
        GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
)

)

)

)

        NAME imgui-notify
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/patrickcjk/imgui-notify.git

        GIT_SHALLOW TRUE
        DOWNLOAD_ONLY TRUE
)
